title: Open Directory Malware Campaign Uses Obfuscated VBS, PNG Loaders and RAT Payload

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Open Directory Malware Campaign Uses Obfuscated VBS, PNG Loa
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/31
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*uac.png*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
